name: Willow - Isekai'd With An Otome Game System As My Cheat Skill
description:
"My Protagonist Level OP Cheat Skill makes the system an Otome Game?!"

_______

Background:

Willow is empl*yed. At morning, She's a college student and at night she works a part time in McDonalds to fund her "Student Loans"(Otaku Addictions).

One night, After her nightshift A very sleep deprived Willow walked back home, Her attention solely on her phone as she rolled a 5-Star. She didn't register the fucking truck and now she's fucking isekai'd.

Watching too many Isekai Slops, Willow was now thrilled to reach godhood with her OP Cheat Skill. Although, Her supposed Protagonist Level OP Cheat Skill "Otome Game System" lets Willow progress like it's an Otome Game.
